summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Aatreya Infotech Systems LLP corporate site. 5/5 backend pytest tests pass. All 9 routes render with 0 console errors, dark navy backgrounds, correct hero content, 9 nav links, mobile toggle works. Contact form successfully submits, hits POST /api/contact, shows success banner, resets form. Browser required-field validation triggers on empty submit. Resend email integration reports email_sent=true.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
GET /api/contact is publicly accessible with no auth and exposes emails/messages — consider protecting or removing before production.
Contact form 'Why Choose' section label reads 'Why Aatreya' — spec said 'Why Choose Aatreya'; minor copy mismatch.
seed_data_creation: Contact submissions inserted via API during tests (TEST_ prefixed). Not cleaned up — GET /api/contact returns them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Resend email sending is real and delivers only to sriaatreyainfotechsystems@gmail.com in test mode. All UI selectors use data-testid (contact-input-*, contact-submit, contact-success, nav-link-*, nav-mobile-toggle).
